description_long: This object is a robust, boxy megaphone with a predominantly gray exterior and a large, circular speaker at the front. The speaker is surrounded by a thick, raised rim and features a yellowish mesh or cone at its center, likely for sound projection. Flanking the speaker are four visible mounting bolts, and to the right of the speaker is a rectangular port or vent, possibly for acoustic or cooling purposes. The body is angular with beveled edges and a solid, industrial design, suggesting durability for outdoor or urban use. The rear and sides are plain, with no visible controls or handles, and the surface appears to be made of hard plastic or metal. There are no visible logos, buttons, or branding elements on any side.
description: A sturdy, angular megaphone with a large circular speaker, yellow mesh center, and a rectangular side port, finished in gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain, boxy body with no visible features except for subtle panel lines.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular speaker with yellow mesh, four mounting bolts, and a rectangular port to the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the side panel and part of the speaker rim.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a flat, featureless back panel with beveled edges.
attribute_mouthpiece_design: The mouthpiece is not distinctly visible; the front is dominated by a large, circular speaker with a raised rim and a yellow mesh center.
attribute_speaker_grill_pattern: The speaker grill features a yellow mesh or honeycomb pattern at the center.
